codeReview.summary: The feature adds export UI and basic PNG/PDF generation, but key required behaviors are incomplete: department filtering and salary include/exclude do not affect exported output, and full-chart capture is not implemented for off-screen content.

issues.description: Department filtering is not implemented. `ExportOptions.department` is collected in the dialog, but export paths call `captureCanvas(options.includeSalary)` and never apply a department-based filter before capture.

Salary include/exclude toggle is effectively a no-op. Export logic only hides elements matching `[data-export-salary]`, but no chart component renders this attribute, so output does not change when salary is excluded.

Full org-chart capture is not guaranteed. The code snapshots `.react-flow__viewport` directly with `toBlob` and does not compute/fit node bounds for off-screen nodes, so large charts can be clipped to the visible viewport.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation-worker skill allows completion with UI-structure tests, but this feature passed without tests that validate exported-content behavior (department filtering, salary inclusion/exclusion, full-canvas capture).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: packages/client/src/__tests__/ExportDialog.test.tsx validates dialog controls/callbacks only, and packages/client/src/__tests__/exportOrgChart.test.ts validates filename/type shapes only; neither asserts export output semantics.

summary: Review failed: export options are partially wired in UI but core behavior is incomplete. Department filtering and salary exclusion do not affect output, and capture logic does not meet the full-canvas export requirement for large/off-screen charts.
